identity: Human male necromancer, late 20s, medium-length brown hair falling to his shoulders, normal living skin tone (NOT undead, NOT gaunt, NOT skeletal), dark brown eyes, stern face, clean-shaven.
outfit: Plain black hooded robe with a simple gold circular clasp at the throat, no ornamentation, black inner cloth.
weapons: A tall wooden staff topped with a real weathered human skull facing outward, held in the right hand.
attackStyle: East-facing. Staff thrust forward in both hands, skull on top glowing sickly green, left palm forward releasing a wisp of green necrotic energy.
spellStyle: East-facing. Staff planted vertically at his side, left hand raised with a glowing green soul orb above the palm, skull on the staff glowing faintly.
blockStyle: East-facing. Staff held horizontally across the chest in both hands, hood up, faint green aura around him.
koStyle: East-facing, kneeling, staff fallen with the skull rolling beside him, head bowed, hood slumped.
southStyle: Facing camera (south), calm idle. Staff held upright in the right hand, skull at the top clearly visible, left hand resting on the clasp of the robe.
portraitStyle: Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Plain black hood, medium brown hair, living-skin-tone face (NOT undead, NOT gaunt), stern expression, circular gold clasp at the throat, wooden staff with weathered human skull visible over the right shoulder.

referenceSheet.prompt:
IDENTITY (this image becomes the canonical identity anchor — preserve in every downstream frame): Human male necromancer, late 20s, medium-length brown hair falling to his shoulders, normal living skin tone (NOT undead, NOT gaunt, NOT skeletal), dark brown eyes, stern face, clean-shaven.

OUTFIT: Plain black hooded robe with a simple gold circular clasp at the throat, no ornamentation, black inner cloth.

WEAPONS: A tall wooden staff topped with a real weathered human skull facing outward, held in the right hand.

CLASS: humanoid. Full-body view, head to feet visible. Character occupies ~70% of the canvas height. Feet aligned near the bottom; headroom above.

POSE: full-body side profile facing right (east), calm combat-ready idle. Head up, eyes visible. NOT a portrait bust, NOT a close-up — entire character from head to feet.

STYLE: detailed pixel art with clean readable silhouette, warm pixel-art palette, transparent background, no ground shadow.

portrait.prompt:
IDENTITY (must match reference sheet exactly): Human male necromancer, late 20s, medium-length brown hair falling to his shoulders, normal living skin tone (NOT undead, NOT gaunt, NOT skeletal), dark brown eyes, stern face, clean-shaven.

OUTFIT: Plain black hooded robe with a simple gold circular clasp at the throat, no ornamentation, black inner cloth.

WEAPONS: A tall wooden staff topped with a real weathered human skull facing outward, held in the right hand.

POSE (portrait): Bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view. Plain black hood, medium brown hair, living-skin-tone face (NOT undead, NOT gaunt), stern expression, circular gold clasp at the throat, wooden staff with weathered human skull visible over the right shoulder.

FRAMING: bust shot from mid-chest up, three-quarter view, centered in a 256x256 canvas, shoulders fill the lower third.

SCALE (non-negotiable): character must occupy approximately 180px of the 256px canvas height — roughly 70%. Do NOT stretch or upscale. Extra space above head and/or below feet is correct.

STYLE: pixel art, transparent background, no ground shadow, no borders, no text. Match the palette and style of the reference sheet.

NEGATIVE: do not add weapons or props not listed in WEAPONS. Do not change palette, species, or outfit from the reference sheet. Do not zoom in — respect SCALE.
